hooks.command: [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && { tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-style 'bg=yellow,fg=black'; tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @busy 1; tmux set-option -uw -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_done; } 2>/dev/null

[ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && { if [ "$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#{window_active}')" = 1 ]; then tmux set-option -uw -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-style; tmux set-option -uw -t "$TMUX_PANE" @busy; tmux set-option -uw -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_done; else tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-style 'bg=blue,fg=white'; tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @busy 1; tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_done 1; fi; } 2>/dev/null

jq -r '.message // ""' | { read -r m; case "$m" in *"waiting for your input"*) exit 0 ;; esac; zsh -c 'source ~/.config/zsh/win-notify.sh; win-notify "Input needed." "Claude"' ; [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && printf '\a' > "$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#{pane_tty}')" ; } 2>/dev/null
